_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data literacy improvement involves taking responsibility for improving the organisation’s data literacy; encouraging a data-driven culture within the organisation by strengthening data literacy skills among all employees; persuading senior decision-makers that data literacy is a vital part of a data-driven culture, enabling effective decision-making at all levels.
reference_document_element_description: Build organizational data culture through executive sponsorship, success story amplification, recognition programs, and visible leadership commitment to data-informed decision-making.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.618), DQ-S-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.573).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.606). Shared vocabulary: [culture, data, decision, making]. DDaT-only terms [among, driven, effective, employees, enabling, encouraging] vs WIDAI-only terms [amplification, build, commitment, executive, informed, leadership] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.876, R=0.886). Balanced P/R — the 47-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Data literacy improvement involves taking responsibility for improving the organ" and "Build organizational data culture through executive sponsorship, success story a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.628 ≈ STS 0.606 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [culture, data, decision, making] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [culture, data, decision, making]. DDaT-only: [among, driven, effective, employees, enabling, encouraging]. WIDAI-only: [amplification, build, commitment, executive, informed, leadership].
